name: remnote-local
description: Use a locally running RemNote MCP Server from Claude Desktop or Cowork without a public HTTPS tunnel.
long_description: RemNote Local is a Claude Desktop extension that exposes RemNote MCP tools over stdio and forwards calls to a local remnote-mcp-server Streamable HTTP endpoint. It can also be used by Claude Cowork in Claude Desktop when desktop extensions are enabled. Start remnote-mcp-server and keep the RemNote Automation Bridge plugin connected before using the tools.

tools.name: remnote_create_note
tools.description: Create a new note in RemNote with optional content, parent, and exact tag Rem IDs. Supports hierarchical markdown in content and flashcard syntax (e.g. "- Term :: Definition"). At least one of title or content must be provided. Recommended preflight once per session: remnote_status.

tools.name: remnote_search
tools.description: Search the RemNote knowledge base. For whole-KB orientation, prefer includeContent="structured" with depth=1 and childLimit=500, then follow remIds with remnote_read_note. Use includeContent="markdown" for human-readable summaries.

tools.name: remnote_search_by_tag
tools.description: Find notes by tag and return resolved ancestor context targets (nearest document/daily document when available, otherwise nearest non-document ancestor). Supports the same includeContent modes as remnote_search.

tools.name: remnote_read_note
tools.description: Read a specific note from RemNote by its Rem ID. For hierarchy traversal, prefer includeContent="structured" and start shallow (depth=1, childLimit=500), then deepen only selected branches. Use includeContent="markdown" for summarization.

tools.name: remnote_update_note
tools.description: Update note metadata in RemNote. Use this tool for title changes only.

tools.name: remnote_insert_children
tools.description: Insert new child Rems under a parent at a deterministic position without replacing existing children. Use this for tag description nodes and hierarchy maintenance.

tools.name: remnote_replace_children
tools.description: Replace all direct children under a parent Rem. This is destructive because existing child Rem IDs are removed and may be blocked by bridge policy.

tools.name: remnote_update_tags
tools.description: Add or remove tags from a note by exact tag Rem IDs. Use this for production tagging workflows to avoid ambiguous name lookup.

tools.name: remnote_append_journal
tools.description: Append content to today's daily document in RemNote with optional exact tag Rem IDs. Recommended preflight once per session: remnote_status.

tools.name: remnote_get_playbook
tools.description: Get an operations playbook for MCP agents: status-first recommendation, navigation presets, content-mode guidance, and write-safety decision tree.

tools.name: remnote_status
tools.description: Check bridge connection health, compatibility warnings, and write-policy capabilities. Recommended once per session before write operations.

tools.name: remnote_read_table
tools.description: Read an Advanced Table from RemNote by exact title or Rem ID. Returns the table schema (columns with property types) and row data (cell values). Use this when you need structured tabular data. For simple tag-based queries without table structure, prefer remnote_search_by_tag.
